description: SV caller concordance evidence. DELLY + Manta INV calls overlapping the candidate, with per-sample split-read and discordant-pair counts. This is PHYSICAL evidence (real DNA rearrangement signatures) as opposed to Layer A's statistical sim_mat evidence. At 9× coverage, SV callers miss many true inversions — absence of Layer B does NOT falsify a Layer A candidate.
question: Q7

n_sv_calls.description: Total SV calls overlapping candidate region

n_both_caller_concordant.description: count of INV calls where DELLY and Manta agree on position ±1kb

bp1_concordance_kb.description: distance between DELLY and Manta bp1 calls in kb

samples_with_sv_support.description: Samples with at least one SV call (either caller) passing filters

sv_concordance_class.description: full = both callers agree at both boundaries; partial = one caller only OR boundary disagreement; none = no SV calls
